TO: [✓]JEANNE          [✓] JAY                    FROM:___Rich
   [✓]LYNN            [✓] BARBARA
   [ ]RICH            [✓] BOB S.              DATE:_2/11/81
   [✓]HELEN           [ ] OTHER_______________

   [✓]TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW          A-81-02-0006
   [ ]CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
        (IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

   FILE LOCATION:_________________________________________________________

   INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE:          YES [ ]          NO [ ]

   ________________________________________________________________________

   CALLER_______________________________________________

   REPRESENTING_________________________________

   PHONE NUMBER:________________________________


   QUESTION: _See attached letter
   ___________________________________________________________________
   ___________________________________________________________________
   ___________________________________________________________________
   ___________________________________________________________________


   ANSWER:  Question #1 : The committee need not file
           a attached statement because it did not
           expend $500 a more.

           Question #2: The committee will not be
           required to file a semi-annual statement
           because it had no activity during the
           six month period.

           ________________________________________________________________

           ________________________________________________________________

January 23, 1981                                A-81-02-006

                                                          Marina
                                                          CityClub

Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Gentlemen:

My understanding is that until an entity qualifies, for example,
as a Major Donor Committee (it has made contributions to or
expended funds at the behest of candidates or committees total-
ing $5,000 or more in a calendar year), it does not have to file
any campaign statements, Threshold or Semi-Annual.

Thus, if the $5,000 threshold is not reached until July 1, the
first statement that would have to be filed would be the 3rd
Threshold Statement.

Query No. 1: If during the period September 18-October 17, the
committee does not make contributions or expend funds in excess
of $499, would it have to file a 4th Threshold Statement?

Query No. 2: Suppose the entity had reached the $5,000 threshold
before July 1 and has filed the appropriate statements, including
the Semi-Annual Statement due July 31, but has had no activity
subsequent to June 30, would it nonetheless have to file a
Semi-Annual Statement for the July 1-December 31 period?

Your early response will be appreciated.

                                          Very truly yours,

                                          MARINA CITY CLUB, LTD.

                                          [signature]
                                          A. V. Sullivan, Jr.
                                          Counsel

AVS:mrw




Marina City Club • 4333 Admiralty Way • Marina del Rey, California 90291 • (213) 822-0611
                    Mailing Address: Post Office Box 92726 • Los Angeles, California 90009

                                                           REC'D.  1-26
DATED  1-23    RE: Campaign Afrgs.

ADMINISTRATION          CONFLICTS/LEGAL        ENFORCEMENT
___BOB T.              ___TOM S.              ___BOB B.
___LINDA                                      ___ROGER
___BEV                 ___SARAH
                       ✓ BARBARA
EXECUTIVE
___TOM H.              ___PATSY               TA&A
___TED                                        ___LYNN          ✓ JAY
___NANCY W.                                   ___CARLA         ___RICH
___JEANNE                                     ___MARYANN       ___HELEN-L.A.
___BOB S.                                     ___BERMA


INFORMATION            ---REQUEST FOR ADVICE--MUST BE ANSWERED WITHIN 21 DAYS

    ✓ Rich
___________. PLEASE:

___TAKE WHATEVER ACTION YOU CONSIDER APPROPRIATE
✓ REPLY DIRECT BY  2/1/81  --COPY TO  Patsy
___PREPARE SUGGESTED REPLY AND RETURN TO
___COORDIN'  "DRY WITH


2/1/81    2:00PM

Called in Eileen & answered questions from
letter dated 1/23/81.

1) The committee would not be to file a thriller
   attendant sent did integrate 5 Grand

2) The committee would not be required to file a
   semi-annual because it had no activity
   during the 6 month period.

                                                R

January 23, 1981

Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Gentlemen:

My understanding is that until an entity qualifies, for example,
as a Major Donor Committee (it has made contributions to or
expended funds at the behest of candidates or committees total-
ling $5,000 or more in a calendar year), it does not have to file
any campaign statements, Threshold or Semi-Annual.

Thus, if the $5,000 threshold is not reached until July 1, the
first statement that would have to be filed would be the 3rd
Threshold Statement.

Query No. 1: If during the period September 18-October 17, the
committee does not make contributions or expend funds in excess
of $499, would it have to file a 4th Threshold Statement?

Query No. 2: Suppose the entity had reached the $5,000 threshold
before July 1 and has filed the appropriate statements, including
the Semi-Annual Statement due July 31, but has had no activity
subsequent to June 30, would it nevertheless have to file a
Semi-Annual Statement for the July 1-December 31 period?

Your early response will be appreciated.

Very truly yours,

MARINA CITY CLUB, LTD.

A. V. Sullivan, Jr.
Counsel
